title: Ubiquiti UISP-Cable-Carrier (TC-Carrier), outdoor SFTP cable, Cat5e, 305m
description: UISP-Cable-Carrier is a specially designed 5e category SFTP cable for use in extreme outdoor conditions . Thanks to its design, it can be used for very long distances and for powering devices via PoE and easy grounding thanks to shielding wire Spool length - 305 m Category 5e, inner braiding, shielding foil 24 AWG cable cross-section Insulated weather-resistant cable sheath Inner shielded foil and drainage conductor for increased protection against ESD damage Cross to separate pairs against crosstalk
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding type SFTP (S/FTP) Installation temperature [°C] 20 up to 60 Storage temperature [°C] 30 up to 75 Weight [kg/km] 52 Conductor wire gauge AWG24 Cable type Solid Purpose Outdoor Conductor material Copper Sheath material PE Length [m] 305 Outer diameter [mm) 6,8 Color Black
